arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand Responds to Viewer Unhappy With Commentary During Athletic Club 0-3 Man Utd
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand Responds to Viewer Unhappy With Commentary During Athletic Club 0-3 Man Utd

arts.ttl: 'This guy': Rio Ferdinand blown away by Manchester United player who won 10 duels vs Athletic Bilbao last night
arts.sum: Manchester United took a huge step towards the Europa League final after making light work of Athletic Bilbao in Thursday’s semi-final first leg. Casemiro opened...

arts.ttl: Athletic Club 0-3 Man Utd: 3 talking points as Amorim's Red Devils show ruthless side
arts.sum: Three first half goals did the damage for Athletic Club, who would have been hoping to go on and lift the trophy on home turf, with defender Daniel Vivian also dismissed for the hosts during that period. Manchester United have firmly put one foot into this season’s Europa League final after sweeping to victory in the first leg of their last four encounter with Athletic Club.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim warns his Man United players they 'need to be prepared' for an Athletic Bilbao comeback in Old Trafford second leg despite 3-0 win
arts.sum: United head coach Ruben Amorim warned against complacency after a dramatic 16-minute spell before half-time saw his team score three goals and Athletic Bilbao have a man sent off.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim says Man United not through to final yet despite victory in Bilbao
arts.sum: Athletic flew out the blocks but imploded after Casemiro put United ahead in the 30th minute.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund posts ANOTHER crude joke on Instagram after Man United's emphatic Europa League win over Athletic Bilbao
arts.sum: Manchester United travelled to Spain to take on Athletic Bilbao in the first leg of their semi-final and produced a stunning performance to emerge with a 3-0 victory.

arts.ttl: Was Bilbao win best of Amorim's Man Utd reign?
arts.sum: Manchester United have one foot in the Europa League final after winning 3-0 at Athletic Bilbao following a performance described as the best of Ruben Amorim's reign.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim shows true colours as he picks out Man Utd mistake in brilliant Bilbao win
arts.sum: Manchester United have put one foot into the Europa League final by beating Athletic Bilbao 3-0 in Spain but their Portuguese manager is cautious of being too confident ahead of the second leg
